info.name: Ecom AI - External APIs (OpenAI & Make.com)
info.description: Direct API checks for OpenAI and Make.com webhook used by the Ecom AI Customer Support project.

request.description: 200 = key is valid. 401 = invalid key. Does not check quota.
429 insufficient_quota indicates project has no credit. 200 returns a reply.
Mirrors what the backend sends during normal chat for quick validation.

body.raw:
{
  "event": "escalation_details",
  "request_id": "demo-request-123",
  "session_id": "eac_demo_session",
  "reason": "human_request",
  "message": "User asked for a human",
  "contact": { "name": "Demo User", "email": "demo@example.com" },
  "note": "N/A",
  "transcript": "[{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":\"I need a human\"}]",
  "meta": { "origin": "http://localhost", "ts": "2026-03-27T12:00:00Z" },
  "admin_link": "http://localhost:3000/conversations/u/DEMO-UID"
}

request.description: Sends a sample escalation payload directly to your Make.com webhook URL.
